role: Test suite directory for ArchSpine's God mode and MCP context mode.
responsibility: Validates the orchestration of God mode dossier generation and MCP context mode behavior through integration tests using Vitest.

children.role: Vitest integration test suite for the God mode orchestration and SyncService runner
